# VibeBot

> AI-powered no-code Discord bot builder. Describe what you want in plain English, get a working bot deployed to the cloud in minutes.

VibeBot lets anyone create custom Discord bots without writing code. Users describe bot behaviors in natural language, and VibeBot's AI generates production-ready Discord.js code. Bots deploy to managed cloud infrastructure with one click.

Key capabilities: 39 pre-built builders across moderation, engagement, utility, automation, finance, and gaming. 6 AI agents for moderation, auto-responses, ticket handling, command creation, event streaming, and chat personas. 21 integrations including OpenAI, Spotify, YouTube, Twitch, Steam, Riot Games, GitHub, Stripe, and more. AI Chat Personas with configurable personalities, trigger modes, conversation memory, and safety controls.

Pricing: Free 3-day trial ($1 setup fee, all features, 1 bot). After trial: Lite at $5/month (hosting, AI persona, template library, $5 one-time AI credit) or Pro at $10/month ($10 monthly AI credits, all 37+ builders, music, agentic AI, extra bot slots). Extra bots $5/month each on Pro. 14-day money-back guarantee.

## Docs

- [Documentation](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs): Full platform documentation covering setup, building, deployment, and billing
- [Getting Started](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/getting-started): Account setup, Discord token, first deploy
- [Quick Start](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/getting-started/quick-start): Get your first bot running in minutes
- [First Bot Walkthrough](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/getting-started/first-bot): End-to-end walkthrough from sign-up to deploy
- [Building Overview](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/building): Builders, behaviors, triggers, AI personas
- [Building with AI](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/building/ai-chat): How to use AI chat to create bot behaviors
- [AI Persona Builder](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/building/ai-persona): Configure AI chatbot personality, memory, safety
- [Behaviors](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/building/behaviors): Behavior model — triggers, conditions, actions
- [Triggers and Actions](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/building/triggers-actions): Reference for all trigger and action types
- [Builders Reference](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/building/builders): All 39 pre-built builders
- [Deployment Overview](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/deployment): How deploys work on the managed cloud
- [Deployment Guide](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/deployment/deploying): One-click cloud deployment walkthrough
- [Discord Token Guide](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/deployment/discord-token): Get a bot token from the Discord Developer Portal
- [Inviting Your Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/deployment/inviting): OAuth2 invite link, scopes, permissions
- [Billing](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/billing): Plans, AI credits, extra bots, refunds
- [AI Credits Explained](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/billing/credits): How AI credits are consumed across features
- [Troubleshooting](https://www.vibebot.gg/docs/troubleshooting): Common errors and fixes

## Guides

- [How to Make a Discord Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/how-to-make-a-discord-bot): Step-by-step guide covering no-code and traditional approaches
- [How to Add Bots to Discord](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/how-to-add-bot-to-discord): Invite links, OAuth2 permissions, and troubleshooting for single and multi-bot setups
- [Discord Moderation Commands Guide](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/discord-moderation-commands-guide): Slowmode, warn, timeout, kick, ban — when to use each and the right escalation order
- [How to Create a Discord Server](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/how-to-create-discord-server): Step-by-step 2026 guide to creating and configuring a Discord server
- [How to Delete a Discord Server](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/how-to-delete-discord-server): Step-by-step guide for deleting on desktop and mobile, what gets erased, and why deletion is permanent
- [Discord Reaction Roles Setup](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/discord-reaction-roles-setup): Complete guide to reaction roles, button roles, and dropdown menus
- [Discord AI Bots Explained](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/discord-ai-bots): Overview of AI-powered Discord bot capabilities
- [discord.js Gotchas](https://www.vibebot.gg/blog/discord-js-gotchas): 8 production bugs every Discord bot dev hits — 50013 permissions, 10062 unknown interactions, intents, partials, rate limits

## Bot Templates

- [Discord Bots Directory](https://www.vibebot.gg/discord-bots): All 22 deployable Discord bot types in one place — moderation, music, tickets, leveling, AI, welcome, giveaway, and more
- [AI Discord Bot Maker](https://www.vibebot.gg/ai-discord-bot-maker): Describe a Discord bot in plain English and the AI builds it
- [Features Hub](https://www.vibebot.gg/features): All bot capabilities and feature pages
- [Discord Moderation Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/moderation): Auto-mod, anti-spam, raid protection, AI threat detection
- [Discord Music Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/music): Spotify, YouTube, SoundCloud streaming with queue and 24/7 playback
- [Discord Ticket Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/tickets): Support tickets with categories, transcripts, claim flow, SLA timers
- [Discord Welcome Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/welcome): Custom greetings, auto-role, DM onboarding
- [Discord Verification Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/verification): Captcha, role-gating, age check, anti-alt detection
- [Discord Birthday Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/birthday): Track member birthdays, send shoutouts, give birthday roles
- [Discord AI Chatbot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/ai-chatbot): GPT-4 / Claude personality with context memory
- [Discord Translator Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/translator): Auto-translate messages across 100+ languages
- [Discord Giveaway Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/giveaways): Reaction or button entries, role multipliers, scheduled draws
- [Discord Leveling Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/leveling): XP from messages and voice, custom rank cards, leaderboards
- [Discord Counting Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/counting): Sequential counting channel with milestone rewards
- [Discord Reaction Role Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/reaction-roles): Self-assign roles via buttons, emoji reactions, dropdowns
- [Discord Application Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/application): Modal-based applications for staff, partners, whitelist
- [Discord Reminder Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/reminder): Schedule reminders, recurring announcements, event countdowns
- [Discord Auto Role Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/auto-role): Assign roles on join, by tenure, by activity, or via reaction triggers
- [Discord RPG Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/rpg): Quests, combat, inventory, parties, leveling — all inside Discord
- [Discord Economy Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/economy): Virtual currency, shop, jobs, gambling, trading
- [Twitch Discord Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/twitch): Live alerts, streamer auto-roles, raid coordination
- [YouTube Discord Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/youtube): New-video alerts, livestream pings, subscriber milestones
- [Roblox Discord Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/roblox): Account verification, group rank sync, in-game stats
- [Minecraft Discord Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/minecraft): Whitelist sync, chat bridge, server status, TPS relay
- [Fortnite Discord Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/fortnite): Stats lookup, daily shop alerts, squad finder
- [Discord Text-to-Speech Bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/text-to-speech): Reads chat messages aloud in voice channels, 30+ languages, accessibility-friendly
- [Discord Bot Hosting](https://www.vibebot.gg/features/hosting): Managed 24/7 cloud hosting, auto-scaling, monitoring

## Alternatives and Comparisons

- [MEE6 Alternative](https://www.vibebot.gg/alternatives/mee6): Free MEE6 alternative — leveling, moderation, custom commands without Premium paywall
- [Dyno Alternative](https://www.vibebot.gg/alternatives/dyno): Dyno alternative with AI auto-mod and faster setup
- [Carl-bot Alternative](https://www.vibebot.gg/alternatives/carl-bot): Carl-bot alternative with visual reaction-role builder
- [VibeBot vs MEE6](https://www.vibebot.gg/compare/vibebot-vs-mee6): Side-by-side feature and pricing comparison
- [VibeBot vs Dyno](https://www.vibebot.gg/compare/vibebot-vs-dyno): Side-by-side feature and pricing comparison
- [VibeBot vs Carl-bot](https://www.vibebot.gg/compare/vibebot-vs-carl-bot): Side-by-side feature and pricing comparison

## Free Tools

- [Discord Tools Directory](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools): 11 free Discord utilities — no login required
- [Discord Timestamp Generator](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/timestamp): Pick a date, get every Discord <t:> format (relative, short time, long date)
- [Discord Text Formatter](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/text-formatter): Bold, italic, strikethrough, spoilers, code blocks, plus 8 fancy Unicode fonts
- [Discord Embed Builder](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/embed): Visual embed editor with live preview, copy webhook-ready JSON
- [Discord Color Picker](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/colors): Hex, decimal, RGB, 0x notation for embed.color and role colors
- [Discord Username Generator](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/username-generator): 7 styles — gamer, aesthetic, cute, edgy, tech, anime, mystic
- [Discord Avatar Downloader](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/avatar-downloader): Look up any Discord user by ID and download their avatar (PNG, 1024x1024)
- [Discord Bio Generator](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/discord-bio-generator): Free About Me / bio templates by vibe — aesthetic, gamer, cute, edgy, minimal, anime, mystic
- [Discord Font Generator](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/font-generator): 12 Unicode font styles — script, fraktur, double-struck, monospace, bubble, upside-down, more
- [Discord Rules Generator](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/discord-rules-generator): Copy-and-paste server rules by type (community, gaming, streamer, study, support, dating) and tone
- [Discord Colored Text Generator](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/discord-colored-text): ANSI code blocks for colored Discord chat with live preview
- [Discord Server Name Generator](https://www.vibebot.gg/tools/discord-server-name-generator): 20 server name ideas per theme (gaming, aesthetic, community, study, streamer, professional)

## Server Templates

- [Discord Server Templates Directory](https://www.vibebot.gg/server-templates): 8 ready-to-replicate Discord server structures (gaming, community, friends, study, streamer, art, aesthetic, support) with channel layouts, role hierarchies, and rule sets

## Deutsch

- [Discord Bot erstellen mit KI](https://www.vibebot.gg/de/discord-bot-erstellen): German-language landing — describe a Discord bot in plain German and the AI builds it (German counterpart of /ai-discord-bot-maker)
- [Discord Server Vorlagen](https://www.vibebot.gg/de/server-vorlagen): German server templates — 8 ready-to-replicate structures with channel layouts, role hierarchies, and rule sets
- [Discord Moderation Bot (Deutsch)](https://www.vibebot.gg/de/features/moderation): German feature page — auto-mod, anti-spam, raid protection, AI threat detection
- [Discord Musik Bot (Deutsch)](https://www.vibebot.gg/de/features/musik): German feature page — Spotify, YouTube, SoundCloud streaming with queue and 24/7 playback
